author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Roger Craig Smith Packs His Briefcase, Resident Evil 5 Style
We're back with another Resident Evil briefcase packing video. This time we've brought in the boulder punching asshole himself, Roger Craig Smith (Chris Redfield), for a Resident Evil 5 Inspired twist. Can he and his co-op partner Jillucy make it to the end?

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/
